zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Ferrers於1355年2月16日出生在英國艾可提爾迪時，他的父親William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby21歲，母親Margaret de Ufford24歲。他於大約1370年與Johanna Poynings在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年2月3日在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年32歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Ferrers于1355年2月16日出生在英国艾可提爾迪时，他的父亲William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby21岁，母亲Margaret de Ufford24岁。他于大约1370年与Johanna Poynings在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年2月3日在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比享年32岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Ferrers was born on 16 February 1355, in Tilty, Essex, England, his father, William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby, was 21 and his mother, Margaret de Ufford, was 24. He married Johanna Poynings about 1370, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 3 February 1388, in Groby, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 32, and was buried in Groby, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Ferrers est né le 16 février 1355, à Tilty, Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Ufford, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Poynings environ 1370, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 février 1388, à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Ferrers am 16. Februar 1355 in Tilty, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby 21 und seine Mutter Margaret de Ufford 24. Er hat um 1370 in England, United Kingdom Johanna Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Februar 1388 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Groby, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Groby, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Ferrers è nato il il 16 febbraio 1355 nel Tilty, Essex, England, il suo padre, William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Ufford, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Poynings circa 1370, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1388, nel Groby, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Groby, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrersが1355年2月16日にイギリスエセックスティルトイで生まれた時，父William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Grobyは21歳，母Margaret de Uffordは24歳であった。約1370年にイギリスイギリスでJohanna Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年2月3日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーで32歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Ferrers(이)가 1355년 2월 16일 영국 에세스 틸티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Ufford(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Johanna Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 2월 3일 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에 묻혔다.

pt.16 February 1355–3 February 1388: 16 de fevereiro de 1355–3 de fevereiro de 1388
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Ferrers nasceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1355, em Tilty, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Ufford, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Poynings aproximadamente 1370, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1388, em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Ferrers родился 16 февраля 1355 г. в местности тилти, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Ufford, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Poynings около 1370 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 февраля 1388 г. в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.16 February 1355–3 February 1388: 16 de febrero de 1355–3 de febrero de 1388
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Ferrers nació el 16 de febrero de 1355, en Tilty, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Ferrers 3rd Baron Ferrers of Groby, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret de Ufford, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Johanna Poynings aproximadamente 1370, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1388, en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
